scripts.dev:http: bash -c 'export WORKSPACE_ROOT="$(pwd)" && cd core && RUN_HTTP_SERVER=true npm run dev'
scripts.dev:full: concurrently "npm run dev:mcp" "npm run dev:http" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build:web
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd core && npm install && cd ../web && npm install
